data.title: Binance Secures Second Major Legal Victory in U.S. Court Under Anti-Terrorism Act in Two Weeks
data.description: Binance, the largest cryptocurrency exchange globally, celebrated a significant legal victory as a U.S. federal court in Alabama dismissed all claims made against the platform. This latest lawsuit saw Binance emerge unscathed, marking a triumph for the company. The ruling, announced on March 12, 2026, exonerated Binance from any wrongdoing in the case, reinforcing its standing in the industry. This outcome underscores Binance's commitment to maintaining its operations amidst legal challenges. The decision in favor of Binance showcases its ability to navigate such legal hurdles successfully.

data.title: Medical Knowledge Group Appoints David Margines to Board of Directors, Advancing Its Legacy in AI- and Analytics-Driven Drug Commercialization
data.description: In a press release dated March 12, 2026, Medical Knowledge Group (MKG) disclosed the addition of David Margines to its Board of Directors. This decision emphasizes the company's dedication to AI- and analytics-centered drug commercialization and its prominence in technology-driven strategies.

data.title: AcreTrader Announces Launch of Proterra AcreTrader Farmland Fund LP
data.description: A new investment fund has been introduced to provide increased access to investment-grade farmland as a unique asset class. Acretrader LLC, operating under the Proterra farmland investment platform, recently unveiled the Proterra AcreTrader Farmland Fund LP. This open-ended fund offers investors the opportunity to diversify their portfolios with a focus on farmland assets. The launch of this fund represents a significant step towards democratizing farmland investments, allowing more individuals to participate in this market.

data.title: decision44 to Define the Next Era of AI-Powered Supply Chain Execution
data.description: In Chicago and Amsterdam on March 12, 2026, the annual event will unite supply chain leaders to shape the future of intelligent and resilient operations. project44, a top provider of supply chain decision intelligence worldwide, will host the event bringing together industry experts.

data.title: B3 reaches major milestone with new cloud-native CSD system from Vermiculus
data.description: The world's largest Central Securities Depository (CSD) project has entered its production phase two, marking a significant milestone for B3 and its members. The Brazilian marketplace operator has recently finalized the implementation of its new CSD system in Stockholm on March 12, 2026. The project has delivered immediate value to B3 and its associates, with the system being recognized as pioneering in the industry.

data.title: JPMorgan Faces $328M Lawsuit Over Alleged Transfers To Coinbase Wallets
data.description: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) is facing a class action lawsuit over allegations that it facilitated a $328 million cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme orchestrated by Goliath Ventures. The lawsuit was filed in U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California, claiming that JPMorgan turned a blind eye to suspicious transactions and allowed fraudulent wire transfers to Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN) wallets. Goliath Ventures reportedly acquired over $328 million from more than 2,000 investors, with about $253 million deposited into JPMorgan's 0305 account between January 2023 and June 2025. Nearly two-thirds of the total amount were transferred to Goliath's Coinbase wallets, totaling approximately $123 million. The scheme was allegedly operated by CEO Christopher Delgado until his arrest in February 2026.

data.title: Acme United Corporation Board Approves Cash Dividend
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Shelton, Conn., Acme United Corporation announced a dividend of 16 cents per share for their common stock (NYSE American: ACU). This cash dividend will be disbursed on April 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of the close of business on March 25, 2026.

data.title: CATalyst Council’s Survey Shows 90% of Devoted Cat Owners Can Increase Veterinary Practice Revenue
data.description: In North Canton, Ohio, the CATalyst Council unveiled preliminary results from the CATalyst 2026 State of the Cat Report, marking it as the most extensive household survey focused on felines in the U.S. Thus far, the survey has gathered insights from over 60,000 U.S. households.  The survey indicates a substantial opportunity for veterinary practices, revealing that the feline patient segment is more expansive, engaged, and feasible for interventions than previously recognized, both from a clinical and financial perspective.

data.title: Women Are Set to Control More Wealth Than Ever but HSBC Finds Only a Minority Feel Prepared for the Financial Decisions Ahead
data.description: In New York, with the Great Wealth Transfer gaining momentum, women are projected to play a significant role in worldwide financial decision-making. By 2030, women are anticipated to oversee over 40% of global wealth, marking a substantial shift in financial influence. Despite being actively involved in their financial affairs, a recent study by HSBC reveals that numerous affluent women express a lack of readiness for the intricate financial choices that come with this responsibility.

data.title: Attain Partners' Reshma Patel-Jackson Named One of The Top 25 Women Leaders in Consulting for 2026 by The Consulting Report
data.description: A renowned management and technology consulting firm, Attain Partners, based in McLean, Virginia, revealed on March 12, 2026, its receipt of national recognition for demonstrating transformational leadership, innovation, and measurable impact within enterprise technology modernization. This acknowledgment highlights their exceptional contributions towards reshaping the industry landscape.

data.title: Cogeco and Cogeco Communications Schedule the Release of their Financial Results for the Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026 and Related Conference Call
data.description: In Montreal, on March 12, 2026, Cogeco Inc. (TSX: CGO) and Cogeco Communications Inc. (TSX: CCA) announced their plan to report financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 ending on February 28, 2026. The disclosure is scheduled for Thursday, April 9, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call is set for Friday, April 10, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Daylight Time) to deliberate on their financial and operational performance. Interested parties can access a live audio webcast of the analyst call on Cogeco's website, specifically the Investor Relations and Events and Presentations pages. For further details, the complete news article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: INVESTIGATION REMINDER: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Hub Group
data.description: Securities litigation partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Hub Group to reach out to him directly. If you were impacted by significant losses in Hub Group stock or options, Wilson encourages you to contact him to explore your legal options.
